title: Bible Graph Unit
description: Schema for Bible Graph unit frontmatter (people, places, clans, tribes, groups, events). Identity is the kebab-case slug; UUIDs are derived at upsert time and never stored in markdown.

slug.description: Kebab-case unique identifier. Authoritative identity for the node; UUID is derived from this slug at upsert time.

title.description: Display name (need not be unique across the dataset)

era.description: Redemptive-history era (closed set of 12; same vocabulary as dictionary.json eras)

references.description: Free-form scripture reference strings (e.g., 'Genesis 1:1', 'Genesis 1:1-3', '1 Samuel 17:50'). Parsed by the AI on demand.

target_slug.description: Kebab-case slug of related unit; resolved to UUID at upsert time.

type.description: Snake_case relationship type. Gender-specific only; no married_to, parent_of, child_of, sibling_of, or spouse_of.

relationships.description: Outgoing relationships to other units. Both sides of every relationship must be explicit in the dataset.
